item.name: auth_route
item.description:
**Description:** > Handles user authentication, registration, password recovery, and session management within the Bright Brain SMS.• **POST create user**  
• Purpose: Registers a new system user (admin/staff).  
• Expected Response: 201 Created with the newly created user details.  
• **POST auth login**  
• Purpose: Authenticates existing users using Email and Password.  
• Expected Response: 200 OK along with a secure JWT Access Token.  
• **POST logout**  
• Purpose: Terminates the user session and invalidates the active session token.  
• **POST forgot password & reset password**  
• Purpose: Manages the secure account recovery process via registered emails.  
• **POST verifyOtp**  
• Purpose: Validates the One-Time Password (OTP) sent during password resets.EndFragment

item.name: student

formdata.value: វ៉ុន ចាន់ថាវី

item.description:
Manages student enrollment, profile records, reporting, and bulk imports.  
• **GET get student & get-one**  
• Purpose: Fetches either the entire student roster or a single student profile by ID.  
• **POST create-student & PUT update student**  
• Purpose: Registers new students and updates their personal, contact, or academic profiles.  
• **POST import**  
• Purpose: Supports bulk student creation via excel/CSV file data import.  
• **GET get stu class & getlist enroll stu**  
• Purpose: Filters and shows students grouped by their designated class schedules.  
• **GET get attendance stu by date**  
• Purpose: Pulls attendance logs filtered by a specific calendar date.EndFragment

item.name: teacher

formdata.value: យិន សំភាស់

item.name: get class id by teacher id

item.description:
**Description:**  
Manages faculty profiles, employment records, and academic classroom assignments.  
• **GET getlist & get-one**  
• Purpose: Retrieves lists of active faculty members or individual teacher profiles.  
• **POST asign teacher toclass & PUT assignteachertoclass**  
• Purpose: Connects teachers to specific subject classes and manages their teaching loads.  
• **POST create teacher & PUT update**  
• Purpose: Onboards new faculty members and updates their operational details.EndFragment

item.name: attendance
item.description:
**Description:**  
Tracks and exports daily check-in/check-out logs for both students and teachers.  
• **POST check In & checkout**  
• Purpose: Registers live timestamps of entry and exit for accountability tracking.  
• **GET export student excel & pdf stu attendance**  
• Purpose: Generates downloadable reports for institutional auditing.  
• **POST teacher mark stu attendance**  
• Purpose: Allows teachers to submit complete class attendance lists (Present/Absent/Excused).EndFragment

item.name: classes
item.description:
**Description:**  
Controls class metadata, student capacity, and classroom grouping.

• **POST add class**  
• Purpose: Provisions new academic sections or classes into the school grid.  
• **GET student select**  
• Purpose: Utility endpoint to list eligible students available for class assignment.EndFragment

item.name: payment
item.description:
**Description:**  
Handles financial transactions by interfacing with secure banking architectures.  
• **POST create QRCode**

• Get Student Information before get amount for payment.  
• Purpose: Calls the **Bakong KHQR API** to instantly generate a dynamic, transaction-specific QR code for school fee invoices.  
• **POST check status payment**  
• Purpose: Actively tracks incoming webhooks/callback data to automatically verify successful money transfers and switch status to "Paid" inside the database.EndFragment
